name: Pesto Shrimp with Pasta
method: Place the spaghetti in a pot of boiling salted water and cook for 10 minutes.
Drain the spaghetti but keep some of the pasta water aside.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet.
Sauté the garlic, asparagus and mushrooms for 5 minutes or until they are tender.
Add the shrimp to the skillet and season with red pepper
If liquid is needed, add a few tablespoons of pasta water.
Combine the pesto sauce and the parmesan cheese.
Stir the pesto into the shrimp.
